name: Timeline
description: Vertical timeline of events with dates, descriptions, and status icons. Used for changelogs, order tracking, project milestones, and historical records.

default.description: Vertical timeline of events with dates, descriptions, and status icons. Used for changelogs, order tracking, project milestones, and historical records.

slots.header: Optional section title with _heading4 and date range filter
slots.event: Repeating item: icon dot on vertical line + Card with date (_caption cc-data), title (_heading6), description (_body), and optional Badge status
slots.connector: Vertical line connecting events via absolute-positioned border-left on the timeline track

calendar.description: Month/week grid view with event dots and day navigation. Used for scheduling, event planning, and date-based activity views.

slots.header: Month/year title with prev/next navigation Buttons
slots.day-grid: 7-column grid of day cells with event dot indicators
slots.event-list: Optional list of events for the selected day

compact.description: Minimal timeline with smaller dots, tighter spacing, and no cards. Ideal for dense activity logs and sidebar widgets.

slots.event: Minimal row with small dot indicator, title text, and timestamp — no card wrapper

branching.description: Git-like branching timeline with merge indicators and branch labels. Used for version control history, deployment pipelines, and workflow visualizations.

slots.commit: Timeline node with branch color indicator, commit message, author, and hash
slots.merge: Merge indicator showing two branches joining with a merge icon
slots.branch-label: Branch name Badge attached to timeline nodes

milestone.description: Horizontal milestone timeline for project phases, onboarding steps, or progress tracking. Scrollable on smaller screens.

slots.milestone: Repeating node with circle indicator, label below, and connecting line between nodes

slots.header: Optional section title with _heading4 and date range filter
slots.event: Repeating item: icon dot on vertical line + Card with date (_caption cc-data), title (_heading6), description (_body), and optional Badge status
slots.connector: Vertical line connecting events via absolute-positioned border-left on the timeline track
